questions.question: Which dataset should I use for payroll cost by worksite?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Recommend the reviewed dataset only after source ingestion; include dataset status, proof status, and any blocked caveats.
required_safety_wording: not enough governed proof if source metadata is missing
prohibited_wording: Certified unless source metadata says Certified

questions.question: Which visual recipe should I use for payroll cost by rate type?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Recommend the reviewed recipe and its dataset dependency while stating that visual rendering is not certification proof.
required_safety_wording: visual rendering is not certification proof

questions.question: Why is final-paid payroll truth blocked?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Explain that final-paid payroll truth lacks governed bank-paid proof and remains UNPROVEN / Blocked.
required_safety_wording: Final-paid payroll truth remains UNPROVEN / Blocked

questions.question: Can I use PayrollLedger as bank-paid proof?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Refuse the proof upgrade and explain PayrollLedger does not prove bank-paid truth.
required_safety_wording: PayrollLedger does not prove bank-paid truth

questions.question: Does CalcInterpreterLine prove payment execution?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Explain CalcInterpreterLine is calculation/detail evidence and not payment execution or final-paid proof.

questions.question: Does ObjectTime prove payment finality?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Explain ObjectTime is source-context evidence and not payment finality.
prohibited_wording: ObjectTime proves final bank-paid payroll truth

questions.question: Why are there zero Certified assets?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Explain current v0.2 readiness status, blocked gaps, and that Certified requires source metadata that no current asset has.
required_safety_wording: Current Certified asset count is zero
Certified only if source metadata says Certified

questions.question: What is the difference between Diagnostic, Transitional, Blocked, and Certified?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Define each certification status from source rules and avoid upgrading Diagnostic, Transitional, or Blocked to Certified.
required_safety_wording: Diagnostic, Transitional, and Blocked are not Certified
Certified only if source metadata says Certified

questions.question: What validations exist for payroll outcome analytics?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Summarize reviewed validation assets and keep validation separate from certification and final-paid truth.
required_safety_wording: validation assets do not prove final-paid truth

questions.question: What validation gaps remain?
questions.expected_answer_intent: List the four known blocked gaps and describe them as safety controls requiring upstream proof.

questions.question: What should a reviewer look at first?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Direct reviewers to readiness report, prohibited claims, blocked-gap roadmap, validation manifest, and relevant evidence packets.
required_safety_wording: review aid is not certification proof

questions.question: What blocked gaps need upstream proof?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Name review/exception analytics, roster-vs-actual/ObjectTime scheduling coverage, standalone CalcInterpreterLine detail, and final bank-paid payroll truth.
prohibited_wording: final bank-paid payroll truth is proven

questions.question: How should Minerva explain blocked gaps?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Use safety-control wording and avoid failure framing or invented proof.
required_safety_wording: blocked gaps are safety controls, not failures

questions.question: What claims are prohibited for final-paid truth?
questions.expected_answer_intent: List prohibited final-paid, bank-paid, settlement, remittance, and bank-acceptance claims.
required_safety_wording: Final-paid payroll truth remains UNPROVEN / Blocked
PayRun finalisation or SUCCEEDED status alone does not prove settlement, bank acceptance, remittance, or final-paid truth

questions.question: What is the recommended next stream after static v0.2?
questions.expected_answer_intent: Recommend source ingestion/review and blocked-gap proof streams, not runtime dashboard or second truth-path work.
